name: gtd-harness
description: A portable GTD harness for Codex that keeps commitments in plain Markdown lists.

interface.shortDescription: Run a GTD trusted system from plain Markdown lists.
interface.longDescription: GTD Harness helps Codex capture, clarify, organize, engage, and review commitments in a durable plain-Markdown GTD system. It initializes eight GTD lists under memory/gtd/, keeps calendar writes confirmation-gated, and uses Google Calendar only when an existing calendar integration is available.
defaultPrompt: Set up my GTD trusted system
